name: quioteframework/ratelimit
description: Rate limiting (login throttle, PDO-backed limiter storage) for Quiote, built on symfony/rate-limiter.

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/ratelimit/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here.
